question: Counter-Strike: MIBR vs RED Canids (BO3) - Circuit X Betboom Redemption Curitiba Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between MIBR and RED Canids in the Circuit X Betboom Redemption Curitiba Playoffs, scheduled for January 24 at 6:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to "MIBR" if MIBR win the match against RED Canids.

This market will resolve to "RED Canids" if RED Canids win the match against MIBR.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

question: CD Leganés vs. Granada CF: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming La Liga 2 game between CD Leganés and Granada CF, scheduled for February 6 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if CD Leganés and Granada CF combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Map Handicap: RZN (-1.5) vs Dortmund Gesichtenhausen (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between RIZON and Dortmund Gesichtenhausen in the VCL DACH: Evolution Group B, scheduled for January 25 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "RIZON" if RIZON wins 2 or more maps than Dortmund Gesichtenhausen in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Dortmund Gesichtenhausen".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Map Handicap: RZN (-1.5) vs Dortmund Gesichtenhausen (+1.5)

events.title: Valorant: RIZON vs Dortmund Gesichtenhausen (BO3) - VCL DACH: Evolution Group B
events.description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between RIZON and Dortmund Gesichtenhausen in the VCL DACH: Evolution Group B, scheduled for January 25 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "RIZON" if RIZON win the match against Dortmund Gesichtenhausen.

This market will resolve to "Dortmund Gesichtenhausen" if Dortmund Gesichtenhausen win the match against RIZON.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 26, 4PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: USL Dunkerque vs. En Avant Guingamp: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Ligue 2 game between USL Dunkerque and En Avant Guingamp, scheduled for February 6 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if USL Dunkerque and En Avant Guingamp combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue2.fr. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

In the upcoming Ligue 2 game between FC Annecy and Grenoble Foot 38, scheduled for February 6 at 2:00 PM ET:

question: Total Rounds Over/Under 50.5
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Team Liquid and Karmine Corp in the VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 27 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of rounds across all maps in this match is greater than or equal to 51.

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Valorant: Team Liquid vs Karmine Corp (BO3) - VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Team Liquid and Karmine Corp in the VCT EMEA Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 27 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Liquid" if Team Liquid win the match against Karmine Corp.

This market will resolve to "Karmine Corp" if Karmine Corp win the match against Team Liquid.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.

description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

In the upcoming Serie B game between Cesena FC and Delfino Pescara 1936, scheduled for February 6 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Cesena FC and Delfino Pescara 1936 combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on legab.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 26, 5PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 26, 6PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Australian Open Men's: Keaton Hance vs Mark Ceban
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Keaton Hance and Mark Ceban in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 25 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Hance' if Keaton Hance advances against Mark Ceban.

This market will resolve to 'Ceban' if Mark Ceban advances against Keaton Hance.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Chen vs. Dembo: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Kuan-Shou Chen and Jake Dembo in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 26 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 26, 9PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Curfew in Minneapolis-Saint Paul by Friday?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if an official curfew is officially announced in any part of the cities of Minneapolis, Minnesota or Saint Paul, Minnesota between market creation and January 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Any curfew which is officially announced will qualify regardless of if/when it goes into effect.  

To qualify, the curfew must be officially declared by the City of Minneapolis, the City of St. Paul, Hennepin County, Ramsey County, or a relevant state or federal authority, and must apply to any segment of the population or geographic area within Minneapolis or St. Paul. The curfew may be citywide, countywide, or limited to specific neighborhoods or regions. Temporary curfews (e.g. from 10 PM to 6 AM) will qualify.

Unofficial guidance, voluntary advisories, or curfews outside the specified date range will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official government announcements; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
